reference: I was dusting yesterday, and all of a sudden I experienced an enormous pain in my back and fell to my knees. It felt like a huge knot was in my back, and I was unable to move from the floor for six hours. I was finally able to crawl to my bed, but I am unable to put any vertical weight on my spine. Pain relievers don't seem to help much either. However, I am able to lie comfortably on my back or side as long as I don't move.
text: I was skiing yesterday, and all of a sudden I experienced an enormous pain in my back and fell to my knees. It felt like a huge knot was in my back, and I was unable to move from the floor for six hours. I was finally able to crawl to my bed, but I am unable to put any vertical weight on my spine. Pain relievers don't seem to help much either. However, I am able to lie comfortably on my back or side as long as I don't move.
